title: hieracium rectum subsp. patens
intro: Hieracium rectum subsp. patens is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as Hawkweed, a member of the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. Its medicinal properties also include antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. Hieracium rectum subsp. patens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
